text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
...So basically, you need to use the<n>previous
formula to solve it.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Ah, yesss. I see, I see...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
That I haven't the slightest inkling<n>what you are
talking about!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Keep this up and in allcertainty you're going to failtomorrow's quiz.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Anything but that! I must avoid extra<n>classes this
week at all costs!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Do you realize the gravity of the<n>situation? I made
a promise to<n>perform my latest opera to Urara and
Doto!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Then how about showing a little more<n>effort?
You'll never pass if you can't<n>remember these
equations.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
It's the lack of emotion and<n>backstory that's the
issue. How<n>could I even feign interest without—

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: I've got it!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You must instruct me in the key of D<n>major! I'll
surely remember it that<n>way!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: What?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I know you have what it takes,<n>Hayahide! Being
an operatic prodigy, I<n>can see it—actually, I
guarantee it!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: With haste, I say!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
...As you can see, X is an essential<n>component to
five and six.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: This is factorization. Do you<n>understand?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hrm... The characters have no<n>chemistry. Their
lines come off a bit<n>awkward, don't you agree?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Do not overthink this. The<n>transformation will
happen with a little<n>more emotion!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I was asking for your comprehension<n>level, not a
critique!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Aha, no problem on that front! I have
comprehended something—a truth of<n>the world, in
fact!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
When viewed through the lens of<n>opera, there's
nothing I can't<n>understand!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Why, at this rate, I shall conquer all<n>and assume
my place as the<n>irrefutable Overlord in no time!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Well, I'm glad to see you havesome semblance of motivation.Sigh...
